title: "The Comebacker" Bidding War: Sony Pictures Frontrunner as Buzz Builds
detail: Entertainment media expands coverage of the Tom Hanks baseball film "The Comebacker" as a studio bidding war intensifies. Sony Pictures is reportedly the frontrunner to acquire the project, which would feature Bad Bunny alongside Hanks and Colman Domingo. Director Marielle Heller's attachment draws additional awards-season buzz. The Movie Blog and other outlets note growing fan enthusiasm in early April as the casting reports originally broken by Variety gain wider circulation. Production timing remains tied to Bad Bunny's tour schedule, which runs through late July 2026.

sources.name: The Movie Blog — Comebacker fan response April 2026

title: Adidas BadBo 1.0 "Rise" Sells Out; Resale Market Surges to $230+
detail: A week after the March 28 official launch, the Adidas x Bad Bunny BadBo 1.0 "Rise" colorway is confirmed to have sold out entirely at retail. StockX, eBay, and GOAT listings show resale prices of $230–$260, with the earlier Brown colorway still commanding ~$700. The sell-out continues a pattern of every Bad Bunny Adidas collaboration selling out instantly and appreciating on the secondary market, reinforcing his status as one of sneaker culture's most bankable collaborators.
